text:
Market today: Fed uncertainty is the real driver, with minutes showing a 'family fight' over rates, creating headwinds for your tech/chip names. Meanwhile, some are taking profits in AI chipmakers, suggesting caution, even as AI adoption grows.

Your holdings: SOXL (-35.16%) and SPAL (-23.04%) are leveraged ETFs deeply in the red, needing urgent attention. Margin amplifies these drops. QQQ (-1.57%) and QQQI (-2.96%) are also flagged for trimming.

Watch: Keep a close eye on any further signals from the Fed and how profit-taking in AI chips develops. Your stops are critical here.

Bottom line: Aggressively manage your leveraged losses and position sizing in this uncertain tech environment.
plays: Address SOXL's -35.16% loss immediately. Its stop at 200 is well above the current price of 165.01; adjust or exit to prevent further decay and margin calls.
Review SPAL's -23.04% loss. As a leveraged ETF, it moves fast. Its stop at 21.38 is above the current price of 19.35; consider adjusting or exiting.
Trim QQQ (-1.57%) and QQQI (-2.96%) as flagged. Respect QQQ's stop at 670 and QQQI's stop at 52 to manage risk.
